name: mailchimp-claude-skills
description: Toolkit for authoring custom-coded responsive Mailchimp email templates and orchestrating multilingual campaigns. Ships two brand-neutral skills (mailchimp-template-language for MCTL placement, responsive scaffolding, Outlook hardening, accessibility, CSS inlining; mailchimp-multilingual for MC_LANGUAGE / IF:MC_LANGUAGE conditional content / segments-vs-conditional decision tree / multi-market template forking) plus two agents (mailchimp-template-reviewer for qualitative review across accessibility, cross-client risk, and compliance; mailchimp-template-builder for layered build-verify gates and multi-template parallel orchestration). Includes a pre-upload validator that catches structural mistakes (mc:edit placement, duplicates, nesting, oversized HTML, missing compliance tags), a brand-neutral skeleton (XHTML 1.0 Transitional doctype, full MSO conditionals, dark-mode media query, bulletproof button, WCAG 2.2 AA-clean defaults), a 10-pattern structural library, and 5 archetype blueprints (newsletter, promotional, transactional, announcement, re-engagement).
